app.title: Quotes
empty.botsHint: Select text in any message and pick a color to save your first quote.
empty.chats: No quotes for this bot yet
confirm.delBot: Delete all quotes for this bot?
confirm.delChat: Delete all quotes for this chat?
toast.noChat: Open a chat first to save quotes.
toast.notInView: That message isn't loaded in the current view.
set.intro: Highlight any line in your roleplay, color it, and revisit it later — organized per bot and chat, with your own notes.
set.enabledDesc: Turn the selection toolbar and saving on or off.
set.highlightDesc: Keep saved quotes marked right in the message, like a book highlighter.
set.labelsHint: Give each color a meaning (e.g. yellow = important, pink = cute). Used in filters and tooltips.
